/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -arch x86_64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/c64asm.dir/c64asm.c.o -o c64asm
